objective: Split shaders/3d_and_hypercomplex into behavior-owned shader asset subfolders: hypercomplex_escape_time owns 2D/sliced algebraic escape-time shaders, and raymarched_volumes owns 3D distance-estimator/raymarched/volumetric shaders. Preserve behavior with move-only 100% renames and keep existing pubspec/catalog shader asset references stable.
completedSlices: Move-only: moved six 2D/sliced hypercomplex escape-time shaders into hypercomplex_escape_time: quaternion_julia_2d_gpu.frag, tessarine_julia_gpu.frag, split_complex_gpu.frag, dual_complex_gpu.frag, bicomplex_gpu.frag, hypercomplex_newton_gpu.frag.

Move-only: moved six 3D/raymarched shaders into raymarched_volumes alongside existing hydrogen_orbital_gpu.frag: 3d_fractal_gpu.frag, quaternion_julia_3d_gpu.frag, dual_quaternion_julia_gpu.frag, mandelbox_shape_inversion_gpu.frag, mandelbulb_time_modulated_gpu.frag, mandelbox_3d_gpu.frag.
Verified git records all 12 moves as 100% renames with 0 insertions/deletions, so shader source behavior is unchanged.

Shared-code pass found repeated GLSL helpers (linearToSRGB, palette, rotationMatrix, calculateLighting, cmul, qMul), but no shader-code extraction was performed because this repo uses only flutter/runtime_effect.glsl includes and no existing local GLSL include/shared-snippet contract; adding one would risk runtime-effect compilation behavior.
